_meta.purpose: Permanent source of truth for all approved agency deliverables. The system is the custodian. The human is the approver. These roles do not reverse.
_meta.rule: No deliverable is complete until it is logged here, committed to git, and recoverable by any future session without human input.

asset_schema._comment: Every asset entry must include all fields below. null is acceptable for fields not yet known.
asset_schema.name: human-readable descriptive name
asset_schema.source_tool: Higgsfield | Claude | Gmail | Wix | Manual | etc.
asset_schema.template_used: registry ID of template used, or null
asset_schema.intended_use: what this asset is for, where it will appear
asset_schema.delivered_to: recipient name or email, or null
asset_schema.notes: feedback, version history, rejection reasons, context
asset_schema.next_action: what happens next with this asset

renova-houzz-template-v1.name: Renova Builders — Houzz Gallery Image Template
renova-houzz-template-v1.description: Approved visual standard for all Renova Builders Houzz portfolio images

specifications.style: photorealistic, luxury, high-end renovation, editorial quality, 8k
specifications.logo_background: horizontal rectangle — wide and thin, semi-transparent dark, elegant, minimal, premium. NOT a square.
specifications.logo_text: RENOVA BUILDERS in clean white sans-serif
specifications.color_palette: warm golds, walnut tones, brass, marble whites, soft window light
specifications.mood: aspirational, premium, trustworthy, Bay Area luxury remodeling
specifications.prohibited: no text outside logo band, no watermarks, no AI artifacts, no distorted objects

renova-houzz-template-v1.reference_generation_id: TBD — awaiting Maor to confirm locked template generation ID
renova-houzz-template-v1.note: Template was established in a prior session. Once generation ID is confirmed by Maor, update reference_generation_id and this note.

houzz_gallery.name: Houzz Portfolio Gallery
houzz_gallery.description: 20 high-quality AI-generated interior/exterior images for Renova Builders Houzz profile
houzz_gallery.strategy: Resurface existing approved images first. Generate new only when no existing asset qualifies. One image approved before proceeding to next.

ppc_management.name: Google Ads PPC Campaign Management
ppc_management.description: Full PPC audit, strategy, and ongoing management for Renova Builders Google Ads account
ppc_management.current_phase: Execution package built. Awaiting run of renova-execution-package.js to generate live-data output. Execution authorized for A-items (conversion fix, negatives, ad fixes). B-items require Maor approval.

assets.name: Renova PPC — Execution Package Script
assets.intended_use: Google Ads Script — generates full execution-ready recommendation package from live account data. Run in Google Ads Scripts UI.
assets.notes: Covers 5 sections: (1) Conversion tracking audit + repair sequence, (2) Campaign inventory with Keep/Repair/Review/Pause dispositions, (3) Negative keyword draft from actual search terms, (4) Ad approval audit, (5) Execution-ready change list split into A-items (authorized now) and B-items (require approval). Built from confirmed diagnostic data. Executive order June 12, 2026 — authorized scope: measurement fix, structural cleanup, targeting cleanup.
assets.next_action: Run script in Google Ads. Review Section 3 output for negative keyword upload. Submit B-items list for Maor approval.

assets.name: Renova PPC — Confirmed Diagnosis Brief
assets.intended_use: Executive brief — confirmed findings, root causes, recommended fixes, execution plan
assets.notes: Subject: Renova PPC — Confirmed Diagnosis | Real Data | June 12, 2026. Built from diagnostic v2 script output. Key findings: 4 conversion actions identified, all pages views confirmed as primary pollutant, 13 dead campaigns with confirmed root causes, 2 active campaigns spending $4,688.87/30d on misdirected smart bidding.
assets.next_action: Execution package built. Await Maor approval on B-items.

assets.name: Renova Builders PPC Audit + Q3 Growth Plan
assets.intended_use: Initial PPC audit and strategy for Omri's review
assets.notes: Account health rated 4.5/10. Three critical fixes identified. Audit was based on research, not live account data — live data access now confirmed. Full data-driven audit pending campaign export.
assets.next_action: Omri to export Google Ads campaign, keywords, and search terms report (last 90 days). Share with Mona for full audit.
